tool_args.label: Accessibility workforce training success
tool_args.raw_text: Mr. Arroyo discussed the agency's success in training the agency's workforce on delivering customer service with accessibility awareness, as well as efforts to expand the agency's hiring of people with disabilities.

payload.claim_text: The agency has had success training its workforce on customer service with accessibility awareness, and is working to expand hiring of people with disabilities.
payload.subject: accessibility training

evidence_refs.source_quote: Mr. Arroyo discussed the agency's success in training the agency's workforce on delivering customer service with accessibility awareness, as well as efforts to expand the agency's hiring of people with disabilities.

tool_args.label: October 2025 - November Timetable
tool_args.raw_text: October 2025 November Timetable - The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
